creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 8 Apr 2008, S Roberts wrote:

> Hello Larry,
>     Good to hear from you..,
>
> On Tue, 8 Apr 2008 07:29:54 -0500 (CDT), "Larry Rosenman"
> <ler@lerctr.org> said:
>> On Tue, 8 Apr 2008, S Roberts wrote:
>>
>>> => Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.ayamura.org/pub/lsof/NEW/.
>>> fetch: ftp://ftp.ayamura.org/pub/lsof/NEW/lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2: Unknown FT
>>> P error
>>
>> I know the tarball is on the above server, however that server rejects
>> folks
>> without valid reverse DNS.  Can the FreeBSD folks update the distro on
>> the
>> FreeBSD.org servers?
>>
>> I have placed a copy at
>> http://www.lerctr.org/~ler/lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2
>> for you to access.
>>
>
> That's great - able to proceed now.
>
> Thanks a lot, dude :-)
That's what maintainers do, help the user base :)

Enjoy.

>
> Regards,
>
> S Roberts
>
>> If the Project wants to add that as a distfile location, that's fine.
>>
>> Thanks for the report
>> --
>> Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
>> Phone: +1 512-248-2683                 E-Mail: ler@lerctr.org
>> US Mail: 430 Valona Loop, Round Rock, TX 78681-3893
>
